name: Building a Free Movie Streaming Site with NextJS 15, and TMDb API
snippet: Learn how to build a fully functional movie streaming website from scratch using Next.js, TMDb API for movie data, and VidSrc for streaming.

name: Inside4ndroid/TMDB-Embed-API - GitHub
snippet: An api to get embed sources using tmdb id. Contribute to Inside4ndroid/TMDB-Embed-API development by creating an account on GitHub.

name: FilmU — Free Video Embed API
snippet: Free embed API for movies, TV shows & anime. Drop a single iframe into your site — multi-server streaming, subtitles, 4K quality, zero config.

name: SuperEmbed | Free Movie Streaming API - stream movies by IMDB ID
snippet: SuperEmbed is the best free movie streaming API for your website. Auto embed thousands of movies and tv shows available on multiple servers.

name: Autoembed - Next generation Video Streaming API
snippet: Video Streaming API. We offer free streaming links for movies and episodes that can be effortlessly integrated into your website through our embed links, API.

name: Watch TV Series & Movies Online For FREE - Arabic movies
snippet: WatanFlix is the largest platform to watch exclusive Arab series in a high quality through computers, mobiles and tablets for free
